smg.text: Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Showers, heavy at first. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. Showers will ease off later. Force 3 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers at first. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
